calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KARI RUDD of Bay Area Legal Aid, Tel No. (415) 354-6359 appearing with and for the judgment debtor MARJORIE ALLEN-REED;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Matter argued by counsel. The judgment debtor Ms. Allen-Reed was sworn, and testified. The Court ruled as follows: JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARJORIE ALLEN-REED'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. The levy is discharged. Any funds held by the levying officer are to be returned to the judgment debtor Ms. Allen-Reed. COURT SHALL SIGN AND SERVE A FORMAL ORDER ON PARTIES BY MAIL. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR).

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to January 13, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, per the agreement of parties. ORDER SIGNED AND SERVED ON ALL PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
